question: What are your opening hours?
answer: We are open Monday to Friday 9am–8pm, Saturday 9am–7pm, and Sunday 10am–6pm.

question: Where are you located?
answer: Elite Saloon is at 123 Glamour Avenue, Suite 200, New York, NY 10001.

question: How do I book an appointment?
answer: You can book by chatting with our AI assistant, calling us at (212) 555-0100, or emailing hello@elitesaloon.com.

question: How much does a haircut cost?
answer: A classic haircut starts from $35. Fades start at $40. A full Hair & Beard Combo is $50.

question: How much does a beard trim cost?
answer: A beard trim and shape starts from $20. A full beard sculpt/design is $28.

question: Do you offer hot towel shaves?
answer: Yes! Our Hot Towel Straight Razor Shave is $40 and is one of our most popular services.

question: Who are your barbers?
answer: Our team includes Adrian (Master Barber), Marcus (Senior Barber), Alex R. (Color Specialist), and Dean K. (Grooming Specialist).

question: Can I choose my barber?
answer: Absolutely. When booking, just let us know your preferred barber and we will do our best to accommodate you.

question: Do you do hair color?
answer: Yes. Alex R. is our Color Specialist. Single process color starts at $65, highlights from $80, and grey blending from $70.

question: How do I cancel or reschedule?
answer: Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance by calling (212) 555-0100 or emailing hello@elitesaloon.com.

question: Do you accept walk-ins?
answer: We accept walk-ins based on availability, but we recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred barber and time.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cash.

question: Do you sell gift cards?
answer: Yes! Gift cards are available in any amount and can be purchased in-salon or by calling us.

question: Is parking available?
answer: There is paid street parking on Glamour Avenue and a parking garage on 5th Street approximately 1 block away.

question: What products do you use?
answer: We use premium, ammonia-free product lines. Our branded products — Elite Saloon Shampoo, Beard Oil, and Matte Paste — are also available to purchase in-salon.
